title: nasturtium sinuatum var. calycinum
intro: Nasturtium sinuatum var. calycinum, also known as Indian cress or globe flower, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nasturtium sinuatum var. calycinum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
